name: SQL - Pacific Bath - GoogleAds Conv - Purchase

content.query:
-- SQL to produce the "GCLID Purchases PBC" file contents

SELECT
trim(lds.lds_user_3) as [Google Click ID],
'Purchase' as [Conversion Name],
--max(FORMAT (job.ContractDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss-08:00')) as [Conversion Time],
max(FORMAT (job.ContractDate, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) as [Conversion Time],
max(job.JobNetAmt) as [Conversion Value],
'USD' as [Conversion Currency]
FROM
ODS.LP_PBC_Lds_Leads lds
,[ODS].[LP_PBC_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_PBC_srs_SourceSubs] srs
WHERE
lds.id = job.lds_id
and lds.srs_id = srs.id
and lds.lds_user_3 <> ''
and lds.dsp_id = 'Sale'
and DATEDIFF(HOUR,job.ContractDate,GETDATE()) >= 24
and DATEDIFF(HOUR,job.ContractDate,GETDATE()) <= (24*10)
and datediff(DAY, job.LastModifiedOn, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 0 and 10
and lds.src_id = 'Internet'
and srs.Descr = 'Google PPC'
group BY
trim(lds.lds_user_3)
order by
[Conversion Time] desc
